summary: Completed comprehensive testing of FOMO platform's 3 architecture enhancements including missing graph layer endpoints. All backend APIs functional (20/20 tests passed). Frontend Architecture Page loads correctly with Source Health cards, Entity Momentum section, and functional Rebuild Projections button. Parser reliability tracking integrated in CryptoRank, DefiLlama, and CoinGecko parsers.

minor_observations.observation: Route order issue fixed in /api/architecture/graph/layers/stats endpoint
minor_observations.impact: Fixed during testing - stats endpoint was being matched by entity path route

minor_observations.observation: Parser reliability tracking shows timezone comparison warning
minor_observations.impact: Minor - parsers function correctly but reliability metrics show offset-aware datetime issue

passed_tests: GET /api/architecture/events/registry/stats - event registry stats (✅ - 963 links, 97 entities)
Architecture Page UI loads and displays correctly (✅)
Source Health cards display with metrics (✅ - 9 sources)
Rebuild Projections button works (✅ - tested button states)
Parser reliability inheritance - CryptoRank, DefiLlama, CoinGecko extend BaseReliableParser (✅)
